name: Question
about: How do I do X with esp-harness?

---

## What you're trying to do

Be specific. "How do I add a button" → "How do I add a button that
publishes a console EVT when pressed, while still letting scene
navigation work?"

## What you've already tried

Approaches that didn't work, with why. Helps us not repeat suggestions
you've already eliminated.

## Where you looked

Check these first if you haven't:

- [ ] [`README.md`](../../README.md)
- [ ] [`docs/getting-started.md`](../../docs/getting-started.md)
- [ ] [`docs/architecture.md`](../../docs/architecture.md)
- [ ] [`components/aurora-harness/README.md`](../../components/aurora-harness/README.md)
- [ ] [`AGENT.md`](../../AGENT.md)
- [ ] [`docs/faq.md`](../../docs/faq.md)
- [ ] Existing closed issues searching the question

## Environment

```bash
esp-harness --version
esp-harness doctor --json
```
